meaning: adj.翻下的,翻折的n.拒绝,谢绝,低落,可翻下部分
examples: The results show that valve-sieve compound trays have smaller turndown ratio and smaller capacity.
The new efforts go far beyond coloring books at check-in and teddy bears at turndown.
The R-Club accommodations feature complimentary Wi-Fi, nightly turndown service, plush bathrobes and an exclusive concierge.
